key_facts: Company formed June 12, 2017 as Delaware LLC; no operations before July 7, 2017
Direct wholly-owned subsidiary of Jimmy John's Funding, LLC (JJ Issuer)
Ownership chain: JJ Issuer → SPV Guarantor → JJBC → Jimmy John's LLC → JJ Holding Company LLC → IRB Holding Corp → Inspire Brands, Inc.
Company offers franchises for development and operation of Jimmy John's restaurants

note_families.note: Note 2 — Summary of Significant Accounting Policies

policies.fiscal_year: 52 or 53 weeks ending Sunday closest to December 31; all three reported years were 52 weeks
policies.restricted_cash: Primarily cash held to meet securitization reserve requirements; balances in excess of FDIC limits
policies.accounts_receivable: Generated from ongoing franchisee relationships; due within 30 days; allowance for credit losses based on lifetime expected loss

indefinite_lived_intangible.key_assumptions: future revenues, royalty rate, terminal value, discount rate

policies.fair_value_measurements: Restricted cash, AR, AP approximate book value. Trademark tested using Level 3 inputs.
policies.distributions_to_member: Principally from centralized cash management; not expected to be repaid; presented net as financing activity
policies.income_taxes: LLC — income taxes are obligation of Member; no provision in these statements

revenue_recognition.initial_franchise_fees: deferred when received; recognized over contractual term (10 years) once restaurant opens
revenue_recognition.renewal_fees: recognized over contractual term once agreement signed and fee paid
revenue_recognition.forfeitures: recognized as revenue upon termination of commitment
revenue_recognition.development_incentives: lower royalties for new franchisees; recognized over remaining term

policies.change_in_accounting_principle_2025: Reclassified certain upfront cash payments from deferred revenue to other liabilities; $1.6M current + $1.0M noncurrent reclassified as of Dec 29, 2024
policies.new_accounting_pronouncements: Reviewed; none expected to have material effect

securitization_notes.secured_by: substantially all assets of securitization entities including the Company

key_facts.legal_matters: Various litigation and claims incidental to business; no material adverse effect expected

key_facts.services_provided: franchising, marketing, intellectual property, reporting, operating, and support services to franchisees
key_facts.standalone_caveat: Results of operations may not be indicative of those that would have been achieved had the Company operated on a stand-alone basis
